flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at Indiana Wesleyan University-Marion vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.9k vs 2.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Indiana Wesleyan University-Marion fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 2.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Indiana Wesleyan University-Marion rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.0k → $32.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Indiana Wesleyan University-Marion rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.0k → $32.4k).
